1x1.description: A thick cable exits through the top and right edges in an L-shape.

1x2.description: A tee shape with exits on left, right, and bottom edges.

1x3.description: A straight horizontal cable connecting the left and right edges.

2x1.description: A vertical straight cable connects the top and bottom edges.

2x2.description: A tee-shaped cable connects to the top, right, and bottom edges.

2x3.description: A tee-shaped cable connects left, right, and bottom edges.

3x1.description: A tee-shaped cable with exits at left, right, and top edges.

3x2.description: An elbow-shaped cable connects the left and bottom edges.

3x3.description: An elbow cable running from the top edge to the right edge.
